methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned an official UFMG AI recommendations PDF under www.ufmg.br/ia and official UFMG news pages about AI activity and reports.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ufmg.br/ia filetype:pdf ferramentas de IA UFMG
methodsAttempted.notes: The official PDF titled Recomendações para o Uso de Ferramentas de Inteligência Artificial nas Atividades Acadêmicas na UFMG was selected as the primary policy-specific source.

methodsAttempted.query: site:ufmg.br/comunicacao UFMG comissão IA relatório comunidade acadêmica
methodsAttempted.notes: Official UFMG news confirmed a Permanent AI Commission and a community-perceptions report, but it was treated as limited context rather than primary policy evidence.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found a UFMG AI recommendations PDF with direct guidance for academic activities. An official UFMG news article about an AI community report was recorded as limited context because the PDF provides the stronger policy-specific source.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Recomendações para o Uso de Ferramentas de Inteligência Artificial nas Atividades Acadêmicas na UFMG
artifacts.queryUsed: site:ufmg.br inteligencia artificial generativa politica uso ensino UFMG
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official UFMG PDF from the university AI path. The document states it is a first institutional effort and contains recommendations for use of AI tools in teaching, research, extension, administration, training, and governance.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Comissão de IA divulga relatório sobre uso dessa tecnologia pela comunidade acadêmica
artifacts.queryUsed: site:ufmg.br/comunicacao UFMG comissão IA relatório comunidade acadêmica
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official UFMG news article about an AI community-perceptions report and future actions. It is relevant context but does not itself provide the direct recommendations used for claim evidence.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: A Comissão Permanente de Inteligência Artificial (IA) da UFMG divulgou o relatório IA na UFMG: percepções da comunidade acadêmica, primeiro mapeamento sistemático sobre o uso da tecnologia por docentes, discentes e servidores técnico-administrativos da Universidade.
artifacts.notes: Official and relevant, but used only as limited context because it summarizes a mapping/report and future actions rather than the direct recommendations in the UFMG AI guidance PDF.

artifacts.title: Federal University of Minas Gerais (UFMG) AI recommendations staged crawl
artifacts.summary: Official UFMG evidence supports staged candidate claims that UFMG has an AI-use recommendations document and that the document recommends syllabus transparency, care against copying AI-generated output, research disclosure of AI-assisted stages, and AI training/literacy activities. Claims remain agent-reviewed staging candidates only.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.

The primary source is framed as recommendations and a first institutional effort; the staged claims do not assert a binding university-wide policy unless human review later determines that framing is appropriate.
The official UFMG news page about a community AI report was treated as limited context and was not used as primary claim evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
